results.title: Severe heatwave grips Bihar; Red Alert issued in five districts, train services disrupted
results.description: Patna, May 21, 2026 Bihar continues to reel under an intense heatwave, with scorching temperatures and hot winds severely affecting normal life across the state. The India Meteorological Department has issued a ‘Red Alert’ for heatwave conditions in five districts of southwestern Bihar—Bhojpur, Buxar, Kaimur, Rohtas, and Aurangabad—warning that the situation could become extremely dangerous [...] The post Severe heatwave grips Bihar; Red Alert issued in five districts, train services disrupted appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: QIAGEN and NVIDIA Join Forces to Advance AI-Driven Drug Discovery
results.description: QIAGEN’s Digital Insights bioinformatics division is set to integrate NVIDIA’s accelerated computing infrastructure and the BioNeMo platform to strengthen AI-driven drug discovery capabilities for pharmaceutical and biotechnology researchers. The collaboration aims to make AI more actionable in research settings by combining advanced bioinformatics tools with curated biomedical knowledge bases. The partnership is designed to help [...] The post QIAGEN and NVIDIA Join Forces to Advance AI-Driven Drug Discovery first appeared on World Pharma Today .

results.title: Exclusive: Jewelry startup Giva set to raise $28 Mn debt
results.description: Omnichannel jewelry startup Giva is set to raise Rs 270 crore ($28 million) through a multi-tranche debt round, led by BlackSoil Capital, with participation from InCred Credit Fund, Stride Ventures, and Nuvama Crossover Yield Opportunities Fund. The company is raising debt through multiple debenture issuances. This includes Rs 90 crore from BlackSoil Capital, Rs 70 crore from InCred Credit Fund, Rs 40 crore from Nuvama Crossover Yield Opportunities, and Rs 70 crore from Stride Ventures, accoirding the filing reviewed by Entrackr. As per the filing, the debt has a fixed rate of interest of 13.4% per annum which will be payable on monthly basis. The proceeds from the proposed debt round will be used towards working capital requirements, capital expenditure for setting up stores, and other general corporate purposes, filings added. Founded in 2019, Giva originally launched as an affordable jewelry brand, has expanded into gold jewelry and lab-grown diamonds. Led by Ishendra Agarwal, it operates around 210 physical stores across 25 cities in India, alongside its website and app. It adopted a franchise-led model to expand. Last year, the firm indicated that it would close FY26 with more than 300 Giva outlets across the country. Giva has raised over $158 million to date, including its Rs 110 crore (around $12 million) in its Series C extension round led by HPV CC1 ltd in February this year. The new debt could be a part of larger equity and debt funding. While the company is yet to file its FY26 numbers, for the fiscal year ending March 2025, Giva reported a substantial 89% increase in operating revenue, which climbed to Rs 518 crore. Unlike its scale, the company’s losses grew only 22% year-on-year to Rs 72 crore in the same period. GIVA competes with large organised jewellery players such as BlueStone, CaratLane, Melorra, Candere, and Tanishq, along with new-age brands including Palmonas, Jewelbox, Limelight Lab Grown Diamonds, Fiona Diamonds, and Firefly Diamonds.

results.title: GitHub Hack: Internal Repositories Compromised via Employee Device
results.description: GitHub, the popular developer platform owned by Microsoft, has confirmed unauthorised access to its internal repositories who stole data from around 3,800 of them. The code hosting and sharing company detected a compromised employee device infected through a malicious video studio code extension. In a series of posts on X, the company said it had [...] The post GitHub Hack: Internal Repositories Compromised via Employee Device appeared first on CXOToday.com .

results.title: Meta Layoffs 2026: Severance Package For Over 8,000 Employees Explained
results.description: If an employee finds and accepts a new role within Meta itself no later than one week before their termination date, the agreement becomes void and they receive no severance.

results.title: Not a gamble
results.description: The Supreme Court’s sharp rebuke of repeated anticipatory bail pleas being reduced to a “mere gamble” underscores a growing concern in India’s criminal justice system — the misuse of legal remedies meant to protect personal liberty. Anticipatory bail is a crucial safeguard, designed to prevent arbitrary arrest and harassment. However, when accused persons repeatedly [...] The post Not a gamble appeared first on News Today | First with the news .
